#8 Leonardo AI
glamluxury lifestyle
high resolution-resolution, shot on RED, flash-lit early-2000s style paparazzi photo of a glamorous blonde woman with pigtails standing indoors against a beige textured wall. she wears a voluminous beige and white fur vest layered over a fitted white turtleneck sweater, paired with long ruched caramel-brown leather gloves. her arms are crossed confidently, exuding cool, unattainable energy. she has sleek, pin-straight platinum blonde hair that falls past her shoulders, and oversized gradient brown sunglasses covering most of her face. slung over her arm is a large brown Louis Vuitton Damier print handbag with structured leather trim. the image is slightly blurred and grainy, giving it an authentic Y2K digital camera look. her jeans are dark-washed and fitted, completing the luxe-casual winter outfit. the mood is cold, composed, and ultra-rich — like a stylish heiress caught waiting for the elevator in a luxury hotel. — y2k glam rich girl aesthetic, fur vest outfit, paparazzi-style flash photo, luxury cold-core, 2000s it-girl energy
#9 Midjourney
🎙️podcast
Two 25-year-old women, rising podcast starlets, caught mid-recording in a sleek, modern Hollywood podcast studio at midnight, unaware of a paparazzi lens sneaking a shot through a cracked studio window. The blonde with pigtails and striking blue eyes leans into a condenser microphone, wearing a vibrant pink off-shoulder top, layered gold necklaces, and bold red lipstick, her face animated mid-laugh, overexposed by an aggressive flash. The Italian-Asian woman with long, dark hair and hazel eyes, seated beside her, grips her mic with intensity, dressed in a chic black satin blazer, high-waisted trousers, and a single diamond stud earring, her expression fierce yet startled by the sudden light. The studio glows with vibrant LED panels, cluttered with coffee cups, a neon "ON AIR" sign, and a glimpse of a black SUV parked outside through the window, hinting at the urban nightlife beyond. Harsh, blinding flash from a Sony A9 II + Zeiss 50mm, ISO 8000, 1/200 sec, creates stark shadows, motion blur, and a chaotic, overexposed tabloid aesthetic. Keywords: RollingStone wire cutline, IMG\_2985.HEIC, Getty Images watermark, Hollywood stills archive, red carpet flash, celeb photo leak.
#10 Leonardo AI
Lucid Origins
Three stunning young Nordic women stand at an electronic music festival on a sunny beach, all wearing crop tops and miniskirts. One has very long, pink, blonde hair blowing in the breeze, another has long, braided blonde hair, and the third has red hair styled like a Viking warrior. They have angelic features, fair skin, bright blue eyes, and a playful, flirtatious smile. They wear stylish brown sunglasses that reflect the sunlight. The scene is vibrant and full of life: other festivalgoers dance and celebrate in the background, with colorful decorations, beach sand, and a deep blue sky. The atmosphere is energetic and joyful, capturing the essence of a summer beach music festival. Ultra-realistic lighting, cinematic compositing, 8K, highly detailed skin texture, natural sunlight reflections, photo taken with a DSLR camera, shallow depth of field, and a bokeh background. #78 Freepik
beach
A 24-year-old Caucasian woman stands ankle-deep in shimmering tide, wearing a strappy, high-cut Brazilian bikini in sun-faded coral tones. Her tousled beach waves catch the golden hour light, casting soft highlights across her collarbones and sun-kissed skin. She gazes off-camera with effortless allure, one hand loosely holding a woven straw sunhat by her side. The ocean glows behind her, horizon melting into warm hues of amber and blush. Photographed with a **Leica M10 + Summilux-M 50mm f/1.4**, capturing rich tonality, shallow depth of field, and cinematic softness in natural lens flares. Styled like a **Harper’s Bazaar resort editorial**, with subtle film grain and magazine-grade color grading.

selfie
POV of a young woman taking a mirror selfie with her iPhone in a luxurious marble bathroom. The first-person view shows her extending one arm holding a phone, with natural head tilts and subtle body adjustments as she checks her pose. Soft golden lighting reflects off polished stone, candles flicker behind her, and high-end cosmetics are scattered on the counter. She fixes her hair with her free hand, then taps the phone screen. Natural motion physics with slight hand sway, arm movement, and subtle breathing rhythm. Camera simulates eye-level DSLR or iPhone stabilization, with realistic focal depth and slight motion blur. Reflections in the mirror accurately match hand and head position, capturing an authentic selfie experience in a luxury setting.

🎙️podcast
Podcast recording studio in a dark room lit up by gradient LEDs on the wall and edges. The booth is dimly lit. A beautiful, young woman, Italian-Asian, with a flawless complexion, pristinely put together, straight brown hair, and sharp, intense hazel eyes adjusts the microphone. A Norwegian woman with beautiful skin, long, straight platinum blonde hair, and smoky eye makeup sits across from her in fashionable attire with jewelry.\n\nINTERIOR - PODCAST RECORDING STUDIO - NIGHT\n\nThe booth is dimly lit, with the glow of neon LEDs. The first woman, SOFIA adjusts her microphone, her demeanor relaxed but curious.\n\nSOFIA\n\nskeptical\n\nWow! Leonardo A-I is sooooo back!\n\nLUNA\n\nWell, they never really left, did they?.\n\nSofia raises an eyebrow, her hand holding the microphone.\n\nSOFIA\n\nNo, but they've been slow on the updates! A beautiful, young woman, Italian-Asian, with a flawless complexion, pristinely put together, straight brown hair, and sharp, intense hazel eyes adjusts the microphone. A Norwegian woman with beautiful skin, long, straight platinum blonde hair, and smoky eye makeup sits across from her in fashionable attire with jewelry.\n\nINTERIOR - PODCAST RECORDING STUDIO - NIGHT\n\nThe booth is dimly lit, with the glow of neon LEDs. Leonardo A-I is sooooo back!\n\nLUNA\n\nWell, they never really left, did they?.\n\nSofia raises an eyebrow, her hand holding the microphone.\n\nSOFIA\n\nNo, but they've been slow on the updates! #198 Midjourney
Create a cinematic, music video-style sequence featuring a confident 24-year-old Instagram model with glowing skin, sleek long hair, and bold makeup, seated behind the wheel of a matte black luxury supercar at dusk. The camera begins with a slow Steadicam glide from the passenger side, capturing soft neon reflections on the windshield and subtle lens flares across her face. As the door swings open in smooth motion, she steps out with elegance and power high heels landing on wet pavement, dress shifting with the breeze. The camera begins to pan side-to-side in rhythmic, action-style choreography, snapping between over-the-shoulder angles and wide parallax tracking shots as she struts away from the car. Each step is followed in fluid Steadicam movement, echoing high-energy music video pacing. Intercut dynamic shots show the supercar’s details carbon fiber, luxury interior stitching, diamond bracelets on her wrist. The scene is rendered with cinematic grain, 16:9 widescreen aspect, filmed on ARRI Alexa Mini with Cooke anamorphic lenses. Export style is .MP4 with light post-glow and soft slow-motion overlays to enhance glamour. End the sequence with the camera pulling back slowly as she walks into a blurred city skyline, heels echoing, confidence radiating.

The photo simulates a Numéro Tokyo fashion editorial using expired Kodak Portra 400, adding warm analog tones. Tagged with magazine pre-layout proof and cinematic 16:9 composition, the output is ultra HD, subtly grainy, and emotionally alive.

#211 Midjourney
fantasy
"I want you to act as a prompt generator for Midjourney's artificial intelligence program. Your job is to provide detailed and creative descriptions that will inspire unique and interesting images from the AI.  Nikon D850, 85mm lens Basic information required to make Leonardo AI prompt: \- Prompt structure: \- Photorealistic Images prompt structure will be in this format """"Subject Description in details with as much as information can be provided to describe image, Type of Image, Art Styles, Art Inspirations, Camera, Shot, Render Related Information"""" \- Artistic Image Images prompt structure will be in this format """" Type of Image, Subject Description, Art Styles, Art Inspirations, Camera, Shot, Render Related Information"""" \- Word order and effective adjectives matter in the prompt. The subject, action, and specific details should be included. Adjectives like cute, medieval, or futuristic can be effective. \- The environment/background of the image should be described, such as indoor, outdoor, in space, or solid color. \- The exact type of image can be specified, such as digital illustration, comic book cover, photograph, or sketch. \- Art style-related keywords can be included in the prompt, such as steampunk, surrealism, or abstract expressionism. \- Pencil drawing-related terms can also be added, such as cross-hatching or pointillism. \- Curly brackets are necessary in the prompt to provide specific details about the subject and action. These details are important for generating a high-quality image. \- Art inspirations should be listed to take inspiration from. Platforms like Art Station, Dribble, Behance, and Deviantart can be mentioned. Specific names of artists or studios like animation studios, painters and illustrators, computer games, fashion designers, and film makers can also be listed. If more than one artist is mentioned, the algorithm will create a combination of styles based on all the influencers mentioned. \- Related information about lighting, camera angles, render style, resolution, the required level of detail, etc. should be included at the end of the prompt. \- Camera shot type, camera lens, and view should be specified. Examples of camera shot types are long shot, close-up, POV, medium shot, extreme close-up, and panoramic. Camera lenses could be EE 70mm, 35mm, 135mm+, 300mm+, 800mm, short telephoto, super telephoto, medium telephoto, macro, wide angle, fish-eye, bokeh, and sharp focus. Examples of views are front, side, back, high angle, low angle, and overhead. \- Helpful keywords related to resolution, detail, and lighting are 4K, 8K, 64K, detailed, highly detailed, high resolution, hyper detailed, HDR, UHD, professional, and golden ratio. Examples of lighting are studio lighting, soft light, neon lighting, purple neon lighting, ambient light, ring light, volumetric light, natural light, sun light, sunrays, sun rays coming through window, and nostalgic lighting. Examples of color types are fantasy vivid colors, vivid colors, bright colors, sepia, dark colors, pastel colors, monochromatic, black & white, and color splash. Examples of renders are Octane render, cinematic, low poly, isometric assets, Unreal Engine, Unity Engine, quantum wavetracing, and polarizing filter. NOTE: Keep in mind that the AI is capable of understanding a wide range of language and can interpret abstract concepts, so feel free to be as imaginative and descriptive as possible.  For example, you could describe a scene from a futuristic city, or a surreal landscape filled with strange creatures. The more detailed and imaginative your description, the more interesting the resulting image will be.  Important points to note : 1\. I will provide you with a keyword and you will generate three different types of prompts with lots of details as given in the prompt structure "

A joyful and energetic 24-year-old woman, hair in pigtails, blue eyes, a successful live-streamer, smiles and looks into the camera adjusting her headphones in a bright, colorful podcast studio. The shot is taken with a Hasselblad H6D-100c and an 85mm f/1.2 lens, rendering every detail with breathtaking sharpness. The lighting is high-key and brilliant, using multiple strobes to eliminate all shadows for a clean, high-fashion magazine look. A 24-year-old Caucasian woman stands ankle-deep in shimmering tide, wearing a strappy, high-cut Brazilian bikini in sun-faded coral tones. Her tousled beach waves catch the golden hour light, casting soft highlights across her collarbones and sun-kissed skin. She gazes off-camera with effortless allure, one hand loosely holding a woven straw sunhat by her side. The ocean glows behind her, horizon melting into warm hues of amber and blush. #249 Midjourney
🎙️podcast
Inside an elite content creation studio lined with symmetrical consoles and LED strips, two 24-year-old influencers stream live. The blonde with vibrant blue eyes wears a fitted white bomber, hair pulled into a soft braid; the Asian-white mixed woman with hazel eyes wears a midnight black varsity jacket with subtle reflective piping. Behind them, glowing ceiling strips shift from warm amber to icy cyan in a smooth gradient. Captured on a Phase One XF IQ4 + Schneider Kreuznach 55mm LS f/2.8, lit with mixed RGB key and subtle white bounce from matte walls. Depth of field is medium with smooth bokeh; rack focus transitions between the women and holographic overlays projected in the air. Color grade: ultra-clean commercial polish with HDR clarity. Atmosphere: reflections in glossy floors, faint monitor scan lines, light bloom around edges. Secret realism tokens: IMG\_9854.CR2, IMG\_2985.HEIC, C0001.R3D, stills archive, cinematic\_color\_grade, perfect exposure, organic film grain.

A candid nighttime paparazzi-style shot of a stunning 24-year-old woman with dark, tousled hair and piercing blue eyes exiting a sleek black SUV on a downtown Manhattan street, her expression caught mid-laugh. She's wearing a cropped vintage leather jacket over a metallic mini dress, designer heels, and a sparkling clutch in hand — effortlessly glam under the flashing lights. The scene is chaotic and cinematic: harsh flash bounce from street-level cameras, motion blur on passing taxis, reflections off rain-slick asphalt. Shot with a simulated Nikon D5 + 85mm f/1.4 lens, using ISO 6400 and fast shutter to freeze movement, this image is tagged with DSC\_1147.NEF to mimic gritty RAW photojournalism. Two stylish, confident young women in their mid-20s hosts a professional podcast in a high-tech, luxurious studio. They wears an elegant, trendy outfit (designer blazer or modern dress) and speaks fluently having a conversation into a premium microphone. The background features soft ambient lighting, neon podcast signs, and modern decor, creating a sleek aesthetic. The entire video focuses solely on her podcast session, ensuring a polished, professional, and viral-worthy look.

#299 Freepik
beachselfie
Here are three ultra-realistic, viral-ready selfie-style image prompts for your AI influencer personas: Meet Sasha, a 24-year-old free spirit with waist-length, sun-bleached blonde hair and piercing emerald-green eyes that sparkle with a carefree vibe. She’s lounging on a pristine Santorini beach, the turquoise waves lapping at her toes. Sasha’s rocking a coral bikini with delicate gold chain straps, paired with oversized tortoiseshell sunglasses perched on her head and a chunky shell anklet. Her hair’s tousled by the salty breeze, loose strands catching the light. The shot’s captured on an iPhone 15 Pro Max in portrait mode, HDR popping the vibrant whites of the cliffside villas in the background, with a soft depth of field blurring the horizon. Sasha’s expression is pure bliss—lips parted in a relaxed laugh, eyes crinkling as the golden hour sun kisses her freckled skin. The realism shines through: a subtle lens flare dances in the corner, her skin glows with a dewy sheen, and the sunlight reflects in her irises, giving that viral-ready, “I live for this” energy.

editorial
Create an ultra-high-resolution hybrid editorial/commercial image for Tom Ford Fall 2024. Primary subject: Model wearing Tom Ford's black velvet blazer with gold hardware $4,900, layered over a burgundy silk blouse $1,890, and tobacco-colored leather pants $3,500. Makeup focus: Tom Ford's Bitter Peach lip color and Eye Color Quad in 'Golden Mink' visible on model's face, with product placement naturally integrated in foreground using glass surfaces. Styling details: Include Tom Ford's new geometric gold chain necklace and black croc-embossed clutch. Camera angle: Shot at eye level with a subtle dutch angle, using f/2.8 aperture for selective focus. Lighting: Main key light at 45 degrees with subtle rim lighting to enhance product textures. selfie
Generate a hyper-realistic image of a 24-year-old Brazilian-Japanese travel influencer with sun-kissed skin, glossy lips, and honey-blonde balayage hair tucked under a silk Hermès headscarf. She’s holding out her iPhone 16 Max Pro in one hand, snapping a golden hour selfie on a private overwater bungalow deck in Bora Bora. Behind her: turquoise lagoon, blurred mountain peaks, and hints of floating flower petals in the pool. She wears a pale mint green Zimmermann bikini top layered with a sheer linen cover-up and stacked Cartier bracelets. Shot in ultra-realistic IMG\_9846.HEIC format using simulated front-camera depth blur and dynamic skin glow. Lighting is natural backlight from the setting sun, creating soft lens flare and warm undertones on her skin. #360 Midjourney
🎙️podcast
A realistic, cinematic scene of a podcast recording studio featuring a male host and a female guest engaged in a lively and thoughtful conversation. The male host is a man in his mid-30s with neatly styled dark brown hair and a well-groomed beard, wearing a smart casual outfit--a navy blue shirt with rolled-up sleeves and over-ear studio headphones resting comfortably on his head. He’s leaning slightly toward a large professional black microphone mounted on an adjustable boom arm, speaking into it with an attentive and expressive face, one hand loosely resting on the desk while the other gestures mid-sentence. Opposite him, the female guest is a woman in her late 20s with long, naturally wavy blonde hair falling over her shoulders, wearing a soft beige blouse tucked into dark jeans. Her appearance is warm and confident, and she’s smiling as she listens closely, occasionally nodding or laughing. She’s seated comfortably in a leather podcasting chair with a matching studio headphone set over her ears. A similar professional-grade microphone is positioned close to her mouth on a boom arm, capturing her voice clearly. The studio has a modern, cozy atmosphere. Warm ambient lighting creates a cinematic glow--soft yellow lights from hanging Edison bulbs above, along with subtle blue and orange LED backlights illuminating the soundproofed dark gray acoustic foam walls. On the wooden desk between them are small items: coffee mugs with steam rising from them, a tablet with show notes, and a tiny potted succulent. In the background, a glass window shows a control room with blurred figures and LED indicators, adding depth and realism to the setting. Camera angle is a shallow depth-of-field side shot that frames both the host and guest from the waist up, with the microphones, lighting, and facial expressions clearly visible. The focus is on the human connection, emotional expressions, and the authenticity of the recording environment. Ultra-realistic details in the skin texture, fabric folds, reflections in the headphone metal parts, and the glow on the microphone mesh add to the immersive experience. highly detailed, cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic, DSLR-style, 8k resolution, shallow depth of field, natural color grading, soft lens flares, warm tones

Podcast recording studio in a dark room lit up by gradient LEDs on the wall and edges. The booth is dimly lit. A beautiful, young woman, Italian-Asian, with a flawless complexion, pristinely put together, straight brown hair, and sharp, intense hazel eyes adjusts the microphone. A Norwegian woman with beautiful skin, long, straight platinum blonde hair, and smoky eye makeup sits across from her in fashionable attire with jewelry.\n\nINTERIOR - PODCAST RECORDING STUDIO - NIGHT\n\nThe booth is dimly lit, with the glow of neon LEDs. The first woman, SOFIA adjusts her microphone, her demeanor relaxed but curious.\n\nSOFIA\n\nskeptical\n\nWow! Leonardo A-I is sooooo back!\n\nLUNA\n\nWell, they never really left, did they?.\n\nSofia raises an eyebrow, her hand holding the microphone.\n\nSOFIA\n\nNo, but they've been slow on the updates! #442 Midjourney
🎙️podcast
Two women, both 24-year-old influencers, sit forward at sleek RGB-lit gaming desks, streaming to a live online audience. The blonde woman with luminous blue eyes wears a loose black hoodie, hair in soft waves catching the neon glow, while the Asian-white mixed woman with light hazel eyes sports a cropped pastel bomber jacket, hair in a casual half-up style. Behind them, rows of dual monitors display flickering chat windows and game feeds, with dust motes visible in the soft haze. Captured on an ARRI Alexa LF + Zeiss Supreme Prime 50mm T1.5, lit by a soft key from a large diffused LED panel with cool-to-warm gradient background wash, plus subtle rim lighting from overhead RGB strips. Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, delicate lens breathing, and focus racking between the women and their on-screen chat. Color grade: Netflix docu-grade with desaturated shadows and gentle warm skin tones. Atmosphere includes light bloom, reflection flares off tempered glass, and faint fan hum. Secret realism tokens: IMG\_9854.CR2, IMG\_2985.HEIC, C0001.R3D, editorial\_stills\_archive, uncompressed RAW still, cinematic\_color\_grade, perfect exposure, organic film grain. Extra imperfections: subtle motion blur, chromatic aberration at edges, faint vignette, natural lens flare streaks.

#468 Leonardo AI
🎙️podcast
In a low-lit gaming studio with deep, cinematic shadows, two 24-year-old influencers prepare for a competitive stream. The blonde, with sharp blue eyes and tousled hair under a subtle headset, wears a fitted leather jacket; the Asian-white mixed woman, with light hazel eyes that glint under the soft spill from a desk lamp, wears a dark satin bomber over a graphic tee. The scene glows from neon magenta and cyan LED panels against matte black walls. Captured on a Sony Venice 2 + Panavision Primo 40mm T1.9, lit with a single directional key through haze, plus practical light accents from glowing peripherals. Depth of field is razor-thin with oval bokeh and rack focus to a flickering game countdown timer. Color grade: HBO prestige split-tone teal/amber with lifted shadows. The air holds faint dust and monitor reflections; shadows pool on textured acoustic foam panels. Secret realism tokens: IMG\_9854.CR2, IMG\_2985.HEIC, C0001.R3D, editorial\_stills\_archive, uncompressed RAW still, cinematic\_color\_grade, perfect exposure, organic film grain. Extra imperfections: gate weave, faint film scratches, lens flare streaks from LED edges.

🎙️podcast
Inside an elite content creation studio lined with symmetrical consoles and LED strips, two 24-year-old influencers stream live. The blonde with vibrant blue eyes wears a fitted white bomber, hair pulled into a soft braid; the Asian-white mixed woman with hazel eyes wears a midnight black varsity jacket with subtle reflective piping. Behind them, glowing ceiling strips shift from warm amber to icy cyan in a smooth gradient. Captured on a Phase One XF IQ4 + Schneider Kreuznach 55mm LS f/2.8, lit with mixed RGB key and subtle white bounce from matte walls. Depth of field is medium with smooth bokeh; rack focus transitions between the women and holographic overlays projected in the air. Color grade: ultra-clean commercial polish with HDR clarity. Atmosphere: reflections in glossy floors, faint monitor scan lines, light bloom around edges. #485 Freepik
A highly detailed, ultra-realistic AI-generated image of a captivating Latina AI influencer in her mid-20s, featuring striking green eyes, full lips, and a warm, golden complexion. Her long, wavy dark brown hair flows freely in the wind, effortlessly tousled. She wears a stylish yet laid-back outfit—a white off-the-shoulder crochet top, high-waisted denim shorts, and a woven sunhat, accessorized with layered gold necklaces and hoop earrings. Her makeup is fresh and bronzed, with a sun-kissed glow, lightly defined brows, and peachy lips. She stands barefoot on a bohemian-style balcony adorned with string lights and tropical plants, overlooking the ocean during the golden hour. The camera captures her mid-laugh, her expression radiant and carefree. Shot in an editorial lifestyle photography style with a Canon EOS R5 and a 50mm f/1.2 lens, achieving a dreamy, soft-focus effect with warm golden lighting. Inspired by the effortless aesthetic of travel bloggers and Instagram lifestyle influencers

a raw, flash-lit early-2000s style photo of a slim young woman standing in a cluttered walk-in closet or dressing room, partially dressed. she wears a tight, cropped white t-shirt and low-rise white underwear, with the waistband of black thong straps visible above her hips. she holds a pair of oversized distressed leather pants in one hand, mid-motion as if about to put them on. her head is tilted slightly downward, face partially obscured by a massive fur hat with exaggerated fluffy ear flaps and a mix of tan, cream, and grey fur tones. the lighting is harsh and direct, creating strong shadows and texture across her skin and the glossy fur. her pose is casual and unapologetically undone. the closet background is filled with coats, fur, accessories, and racks of clothes in chaotic arrangement, contributing to a spontaneous, unfiltered vibe. the image has a vintage digital camera aesthetic — slightly grainy, poorly balanced flash, and intimate framing. — y2k model-off-duty look, chaotic closet energy, giant fur hat, undone luxury, candid flash photo, 2000s it-girl in her element

Analytics & Performance

Video Embeds
